message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.getmask wrapper parity (franken_numpy-b507)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.ma.getmask that returns the ndarray
mask when the input is a MaskedArray with a non-trivial mask, and
numpy.ma.nomask for arrays with nomask or plain ndarray/array_like
inputs. Test covers partially-masked 1-D and 2-D MaskedArrays,
fully-masked arrays with scalar mask, MaskedArrays constructed without
an explicit mask, plain ndarrays, Python lists, and empty arrays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
